source.cookbook: The Vegan Korean   Complete Guide And Cookbook so
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
1 medium or large cauliflower, cut into small florets (about 7–8 cups)
	1/3 cup water
	4 green onions, sliced thinly
	3 cups baby spinach (optional)
ingredients.original:
1 medium or large cauliflower, cut into small florets (about 7–8 cups)
	1/3 cup water
	4 green onions, sliced thinly
	3 cups baby spinach (optional)

ingredients.item:
¼ cup up to  1/3 cup tamari *
	1 Tbsp white miso *
	3 Tbsps organic maple syrup *
	1 tsp molasses
	1 tsp minced ginger
	1 Tbsp minced garlic
	2 Tbsp toasted sesame seeds
	¼ tsp red pepper flakes
	1 Tbsp organic cornstarch (+ more, if needed) *
	pinch black pepper
